'''Fiver''' was [[Anakin Solo]]'s modified [[R7-series astromech droid|R7 astromech droid]] a year into the war with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. When the [[Peace Brigade]] attacked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] praxeum at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] a little over a year into the invasion, Fiver flew Anakin's X-Wing to distract the Brigade.

Fiver managed to fly the damaged X-Wing back to Anakin, and boarded the transport Anakin had fixed up. Fiver was aboard the transport when Anakin and [[Tahiri Veila]] prepared to make their escape.

Fiver served as Anakin's astromech in battles at [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]], and [[Froz]].
